title: Graph theoretic derivation of mutual linearity for transient probabilities and hitting time distributions in Markov networks
summary: For irreducible, time-homogeneous Markov networks, mutual linearity has recently been established for both occupation probabilities and network currents in the stationary regime as well as in the non-stationary regime in Laplace space. The derivation of this property for the stationary distribution utilized the Markov-chain tree theorem, which also allows for an explicit combinatorial expression of the response ratios under variation of a single transition rate. The extension of this result was proven at the trajectory level by employing the Doob-Meyer decomposition. By employing the all-minors matrix-tree theorem, we show that this property also follows from a graph theoretic formulation and derive explicit combinatorial expressions for the non-stationary response ratios. The stationary result follows as the long-time limit and we also show that the small-time asymptotics are entirely determined by minimal path distances in the underlying graph. Finally we use the graph theoretic approach to prove that mutual linearity also extends to hitting time densities.

AI.tldr: 本文利用图论方法（所有子式矩阵树定理）证明了不可约时间齐次马尔可夫网络中，占据概率和网络电流的互线性性质在非平稳拉普拉斯域中的显式组合表达式，并推广到了首次命中时间密度。
AI.motivation: 扩展已知的互线性性质（原仅适用于平稳分布和拉普拉斯域非平稳情况），从图论角度给出更统一的证明框架，并探索该性质在更一般场景（如小时间渐近、首次命中时间）的适用性。
AI.method: 利用所有子式矩阵树定理（all-minors matrix-tree theorem）的图论表述，推导非平稳响应比的显式组合表达式；通过长时极限恢复平稳结果，通过最小路径距离分析小时间渐近行为；将图论方法推广到首次命中时间密度。
AI.result: 1) 从图论角度重新证明了非平稳区域的互线性性质，并给出显式组合表达式；2) 平稳结果是其长时极限；3) 小时间渐近完全由底层图中的最小路径距离决定；4) 互线性性质可扩展至首次命中时间密度。
AI.conclusion: 图论方法为马尔可夫网络的互线性性质提供了更统一且组合化的证明框架，并揭示了该性质在更广泛动力学量（如首次命中时间）中的普适性。

title: Activated random walk exhibits self-organized criticality
comment: 12 pages; rigorous proofs of Theorems 1 and 2 can be found in arXiv:2406.01731 and arXiv:2501.17938, respectively
summary: To explain the ubiquity of power laws and fractals in nature, Bak, Tang, and Wiesenfeld formulated simple conditions for a system to self-organize into a critical state. Dickman, Muñoz, Vespignani, and Zapperi postulated that the self-organized critical state matches the critical state in corresponding fixed-energy models undergoing traditional phase transitions. Although the theory has been applied broadly over the past five decades, no mathematical model has been proven to exhibit the conjectured behavior. Indeed, the originally proposed abelian sandpile model displays nonuniversal behavior stemming from its slow mixing. Marking the first result of its kind, we prove that the 1-d activated random walk model mixes quickly into a stationary state with power-law avalanches and limiting critical density that equals the critical value for the fixed-energy version.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了1维激活随机游走模型快速混合到具有幂律雪崩的稳态，且其极限临界密度与固定能量版本的临界值一致，这是首个严格证明自组织临界性理论的数学模型结果。
AI.motivation: 自组织临界性（SOC）理论虽被广泛用于解释自然界中的幂律和分形现象，但过去五十年间从未有数学模型被严格证明表现出该理论所推测的行为，尤其是原始提出的阿贝尔沙堆模型由于慢混合展现出非普适行为。
AI.method: 研究聚焦于1维激活随机游走（Activated Random Walk）模型，通过证明该模型快速混合到稳态，并分析其雪崩现象的幂律分布以及临界密度。
AI.result: 证明了1维激活随机游走模型快速混合到具有幂律雪崩的稳态，其极限临界密度等于固定能量版本的临界值，这是该领域的首个严格证明结果。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为自组织临界性理论提供了首个严格的数学证明，填补了该领域长期存在的理论空白，验证了Dickman等人关于自组织临界态与固定能量模型临界态一致性的猜想。

title: Fixed points and crossovers for the hysteresis scaling of dynamic mean-field models
summary: Phase transitions are divided into first-order phase transitions and continuous ones in current classification. While the latter shows striking phenomena of scaling and universality, the former is generically characterized by discontinuous jumps in extensive variables and pronounced hysteresis. Recent studies have demonstrated universal scaling behavior controlled by a cubic fixed point in first-order phase transitions. However, more recent investigations into the hysteresis in a dynamic mean-field quartic model driven through its first-order phase transitions have revealed new scaling exponents for different driving rates. Here, we discover a new exponent for large driving rates arising surprisingly from critical phenomena and show that, depending on the magnitude of the driving rates and on the absence or presence of noise, the same mean-field model remarkably exhibits several universality classes with definite universal scaling exponents governed by their corresponding fixed points through a systematic scaling analysis based on renormalization group theory. The theories and their various crossovers between different fixed points along with complete universal scaling of full curve collapse are verified by numerical results. This further confirms universal scaling in first-order phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究一阶相变中的普适标度行为，发现在平均场四次模型中，不同驱动速率和噪声条件下存在多个普适类，通过重整化群分析确定了相应的固定点，数值结果验证了理论的完整曲线塌缩。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为一阶相变主要表现为不连续跳跃和滞后现象，但近期研究表明其可能存在普适标度行为。作者旨在探索不同驱动速率和噪声条件下，一阶相变是否呈现多个普适类及其对应的临界指数。
AI.method: 采用动力平均场四次模型，通过重整化群理论进行系统标度分析，结合数值模拟验证不同驱动速率和噪声条件下的标度行为，研究各固定点之间的交叉现象。
AI.result: 发现大驱动速率下出现新的临界指数（由临界现象引起），且根据驱动速率大小和噪声的有无，同一模型呈现出多个普适类，分别由不同固定点控制，数值结果完整验证了理论预测的曲线塌缩。
AI.conclusion: 一阶相变中存在丰富的普适标度行为，并非单一普适类，其标度指数由驱动速率和噪声条件共同决定，进一步确立了一阶相变中普适标度现象的存在。

title: Monte Carlo study of the superfluid phase of $^4$He
comment: To appear in J. Phys. Conference Series as part of the Proceedings of the Phenikaa International Physics Conference held in Hanoi, October 2025
summary: Detailed numerical results obtained with state-of-the-art Quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) simulations are presented for the superfluid phase of $^4$He at saturated vapor pressure. The aim of this contribution is that of providing reliable, up-to-date estimates for this archetypal superfluid, reflecting the methodological progress that has taken place over the past two decades. We simulate a system comprising 2,048 helium atoms, i.e., an order of magnitude greater in size than those for which results currently regarded as standard references were originally obtained. We offer revised estimates for energetic and structural properties, as well as for the ground state condensate fraction.

AI.tldr: 本文采用大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟（2048个氦原子），对超流态⁴He在饱和蒸汽压下的基态性质提供了比过去二十年标准参考值更精确的更新估计，涵盖能量、结构和凝聚分数。
AI.motivation: 过去二十年量子蒙特卡洛方法取得显著进展，但当前作为标准参考的⁴He超流体数值结果仍基于较小体系（约200个原子），亟需利用更大规模和更先进的方法提供更可靠、更准确的基准估计。
AI.method: 采用最先进的量子蒙特卡洛（QMC）模拟，系统包含2048个⁴He原子（比传统参考体系大一个数量级），在饱和蒸汽压下对超流态进行数值模拟。
AI.result: 获得了能量性质、结构性质以及基态凝聚分数的修订估计值，相比现有标准参考结果更为精确可靠。
AI.conclusion: 通过大幅增加模拟体系的规模（2048原子），结合过去二十年的方法学进步，为超流⁴He这一典型量子流体提供了更新、更可靠的数值基准。

title: Demonstration of a fermion Quadrupling Condensate via Quantum Monte Carlo Simulation
summary: Fermionic condensation typically occurs via pairing. In recent decades, however, a fundamental question has emerged: whether alternative forms of order exist, such as condensates of fermion quadruplets. These states--including ``charge-4e" superconductors and ``charge-0" counterflow condensates--lie beyond the standard Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer framework, and require strong fluctuations and correlation effects that invalidate the BCS mean-field description. This makes the problem notoriously difficult to study numerically at a microscopic level, as it involves both strong interactions and the fermionic sign problem. Here, we present a microscopic fermionic model featuring correlated hopping that significantly mitigates the sign problem, enabling rigorous Monte-Carlo-based analysis. Using large-scale simulations, we demonstrate the existence of a fermion-quadrupling condensate with a transition temperature comparable to the hopping energy scale. These results provide direct numerical evidence for quartic fermionic order in a microscopic system and suggest that these exotic states are also experimentally accessible in ultracold atomic gases.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建一种带有关联跳跃的微观费米子模型，有效缓解了符号问题，并利用大规模蒙特卡洛模拟首次提供了费米子四聚体凝聚（如电荷-4e超导和电荷-0逆流凝聚）的直接数值证据，表明其转变温度可达跳跃能级量级，且预言了在超冷原子气体中的实验可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统BCS理论仅描述费米子配对凝聚，但理论上可能存在费米子四聚体等非配对凝聚态（如电荷-4e超导、电荷-0逆流凝聚）。由于这些态涉及强关联和强涨落，BCS平均场失效，且数值研究面临强相互作用和费米子符号问题的双重困难。本文旨在克服上述障碍，从微观模型层面寻找费米子四聚体凝聚的直接证据。
AI.method: 设计了一种包含关联跳跃（correlated hopping）的微观费米子模型，该模型显著缓解了费米子符号问题，从而使得大规模蒙特卡洛模拟成为可能。通过数值模拟分析了系统的凝聚态性质。
AI.result: 成功观察到费米子四聚体凝聚（fermion-quadrupling condensate），其转变温度与跳跃能级相当。提供了四重费米子序的微观系统直接数值证据。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证实了费米子四聚体凝聚的存在性，拓展了对非配对费米子凝聚的理解，并指出这类奇异态可通过超冷原子气体在实验中实现。

title: Non-Equilibrium Dynamics of the Time-Dependent Excitonic Coupling in Fluorescent Protein Dimers
summary: We quantify the excitonic coupling in the homodimer of dimeric Venus fluorescent protein using a quantum-classical hybrid workflow. Employing a transition-density coupling formalism, we calculate $J = 74.38~\mathrm{cm^{-1}}$, which is 5.6 times stronger than the far-field point-dipole estimate of $13.31~\mathrm{cm^{-1}}$. This disparity highlights the critical role of near-field multipolar effects at the 27.6~Å chromophore centroid separation. Furthermore, we argue that a separation of timescales resolves the apparent theoretical tension between robust experimental excitonic couplings and the highly decoherent biological environment. While it has been hypothesised that the fluorescent protein $β$-barrel scaffold sustains coupling by attenuating thermal fluctuations, we emphasise that the separation of timescales fundamentally applies irrespective of the exact degree of environmental noise suppression. Collective photoexcitation imprints the Davydov splitting under optical-limit dielectric screening upon absorption, preceding bulk solvent relaxation and sub-picosecond environmental dephasing. To characterise the subsequent post-absorption evolution, we employ stochastic simulations for quantum parts to model the transition from a delocalised exciton superposition to incoherent hopping between localised chromophore states.

AI.tldr: 本文使用量子-经典混合工作流量化了二聚体Venus荧光蛋白同源二聚体中的激子耦合，计算出J=74.38 cm⁻¹，比远场点偶极估计强5.6倍，揭示了近场多极效应在27.6 Å间距下的关键作用，并论证了时间尺度分离可解决实验强耦合与生物环境强退相干之间的理论张力。
AI.motivation: 量化荧光蛋白同源二聚体中的真实激子耦合强度，阐明近场多极效应的重要性，并解决实验观测到的稳健激子耦合与生物环境中强退相干之间的表观理论矛盾。
AI.method: 采用量子-经典混合工作流，基于跃迁密度耦合形式计算激子耦合；使用随机模拟对量子部分进行建模，描述从离域激子叠加态到局域发色团间非相干跳跃的转变。
AI.result: 计算出激子耦合J=74.38 cm⁻¹，是远场点偶极估计（13.31 cm⁻¹）的5.6倍；证实了时间尺度分离机制的有效性，发现集体光激发在吸收时即印刻了Davydov分裂，先于溶剂弛豫和亚皮秒环境退相干。
AI.conclusion: 近场多极效应在短间距下至关重要；时间尺度分离从根本上解释了激子耦合在退相干环境中的稳健性，而不依赖于环境噪声抑制的具体程度。

title: Criticality on Rényi defects at (2+1)$d$ O(3) quantum critical points
summary: At a quantum critical point, the universal scaling behavior of Rényi entanglement entropy is controlled by the universality class of the codimension-two Rényi (or conical) defects in the infrared theory. In this work we perform a systematic study of critical correlations along Rényi defect lines in (2+1)d quantum spin models realizing quantum phase transitions described by the O(3) Wilson-Fisher universality class, using large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations. We present numerical evidence that, for a fixed Rényi index $n$, there exist multiple Rényi defect universality classes, with distinct critical exponents for the O(3) order parameter on the defect. These universality classes are realized by choosing microscopically different entanglement cuts in lattice models, which we classify as ordinary, special and extraordinary according to their relation to surface criticality. For the extraordinary entanglement cut, we further find evidence for a phase transition on the defect as a function of the Rényi index. Our results highlight the key role of defect universality classes in determining the universal scaling of Rényi entropy, and provide a framework for understanding the previously observed dependence of Rényi entropy scaling on microscopic lattice details.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟，系统研究了(2+1)d O(3) Wilson-Fisher量子临界点上的Rényi纠缠熵缺陷线。发现对于固定Rényi指数n，存在多种缺陷普适类（ordinary、special、extraordinary），其临界指数不同，且extraordinary类中Rényi指数可驱动缺陷相变。
AI.motivation: 理解量子临界点上Rényi纠缠熵的普适标度行为，特别是解释为何Rényi熵标度依赖于微观晶格细节这一此前未解之谜。
AI.method: 使用大规模量子蒙特卡洛(QMC)模拟，在(2+1)d量子自旋模型中系统研究O(3) Wilson-Fisher普适类中沿Rényi缺陷线的临界关联，通过微观上不同的纠缠切割方式实现多种缺陷普适类。
AI.result: 1) 固定Rényi指数n下存在多个缺陷普适类，具有不同的O(3)序参量临界指数；2) 将其分类为ordinary、special和extraordinary三类，与表面临界性相关；3) 在extraordinary类中发现了随Rényi指数变化的缺陷相变。
AI.conclusion: 缺陷普适类在决定Rényi熵的普适标度中起关键作用，为理解Rényi熵标度对微观晶格细节的依赖性提供了理论框架。

title: Observation of single antiferromagnetic magnon modes in the tunnelling transistors of spin-1/2 Kitaev system a-RuCl3
summary: The small gap room temperature semiconductor a-RuCl3 which is known to undergo a Mott-Hubbard transition at low temperatures, is one of the most promising candidates for realisation of an exotic matter form, the quantum spin liquid state, which may have applications in quantum computing. Although being extensively investigated by neutron scattering techniques, electronic study of this system in form of van der Waals heterostructures has been limited to mainly graphene proximity. Here we report a systematic study of planar and tunnelling electronic properties of a -RuCl3 films, where we observe an n-type semiconducting property of a -RuCl3 films at room temperature, with a Mott insulator nature onset below 120K. In constant some of the previous studies, we focus on films of three-layer thickness and below and we find inelastic scattering features, below the Neel temperature of 7-14.5 K, some of which we attribute to single magnon modes. We believe our study electrically confirms preserved low temperature signatures of the bulk zigzag antiferromagnetic order and its single magnon modes within the previously observed continuum in atomically thin film limit. The experimental progress could be a step for future electronic characterisation of quantum spin liquid state in the vicinity of the zigzag antiferromagnetic order as well as the Majorona excitations in a-RuCl3 in tunnelling transistors.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了α-RuCl3薄膜的平面和隧穿电子特性，发现其在室温下呈n型半导体性质，120K以下呈现Mott绝缘体特性。在三层及以下厚度的薄膜中，观测到低于奈尔温度（7-14.5K）的非弹性散射特征，其中部分归因于单磁子模式。实验证实了原子级薄层中保留了块体材料的锯齿形反铁磁序及其单磁子模式。
AI.motivation: α-RuCl3是一种在小能隙室温半导体，低温下经历Mott-Hubbard转变，是实现量子自旋液体（可能用于量子计算）最有希望的候选材料之一。此前该材料的中子散射研究广泛，但电子层面的研究（尤其是范德华异质结构形式）主要局限于石墨烯邻近效应，缺乏系统的电子特性研究。
AI.method: 对α-RuCl3薄膜进行系统的平面和隧穿电子特性测量，聚焦于三层及以下厚度的薄膜，研究其电学性质随温度的变化，并分析非弹性散射特征。
AI.result: 室温下α-RuCl3薄膜呈现n型半导体特性；120K以下开始呈现Mott绝缘体特性；在低于奈尔温度（7-14.5K）时观测到非弹性散射特征，其中部分归因于单磁子模式。
AI.conclusion: 实验证实了在原子级薄层薄膜中，锯齿形反铁磁序及其单磁子模式得以保留。这一进展为未来在锯齿形反铁磁序附近表征量子自旋液态以及α-RuCl3隧道晶体管中Majorana激发的电子特性迈出了重要一步。

title: MuDirac 1.3.0: A Sustainable Software Tool for Calculating Ground State Nuclear Properties Using Muonic X-Ray Measurements
comment: 37 pages, 16 figures. Manuscript on use of negative muons for estimating nuclear properties
summary: The nuclear charge radius is one of the most fundamental quantities of the atomic nucleus. It can be deduced from a combination of experimental measurements of muonicX-raytransitionenergieswithmodellingofthoseX-raytransitionenergies. In thisworkwepresentMuDirac (1.3.0), whichisanopen, publiclyavailable, sustainable and computationally efficient software tool that will be at put the disposal of the negative muon community. With MuDirac (1.3.0), the community will be able to accurately and efficiently estimate nuclear properties, such as the nuclear charge radius, by assuming a 2-parameter Fermi distribution of the nuclear charge.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MuDirac（1.3.0）——一个开源、高效、可持续的计算工具，用于通过μ子X射线跃迁能量数据估算原子核电荷半径等核性质。
AI.motivation: 核电荷半径是原子核最基本的物理量之一，但目前缺少一个公开、可持续且计算高效的软件工具供负μ子社区使用。
AI.method: 通过建立开源的软件工具MuDirac（1.3.0），采用双参数费米分布模型对核电荷分布进行建模，结合实验测得的μ子X射线跃迁能量来计算核性质。
AI.result: 开发出MuDirac（1.3.0）——一个可公开获取、可持续维护且计算高效的软件工具。
AI.conclusion: MuDirac（1.3.0）能够使负μ子社区准确高效地估算核电荷半径等核性质，填补了该领域开源工具的空白。

title: Dilute Zn alloying in biodegradable Mg wires: microstructure, mechanical performance, and degradation behavior
summary: Dilute Mg-Zn wires are of great interest for biodegradable small-bone fixation, as magnesium degradation can support bone-related processes, while low zinc additions may provide biological benefits without compromising biocompatibility. In this work, the influence of Zn content below the room-temperature solubility limit was assessed in Mg-Zn wires intended for resorbable implant applications. Mg-0.4Zn, Mg-0.6Zn, Mg-0.8Zn, and Mg-1.5Zn alloys were processed by single-step direct hot extrusion into thin wires and characterized by correlative microstructural analysis, tensile testing, bending experiments, and in vitro degradation. All compositions achieved a recrystallized fine equiaxed grain size of 5.0-5.9 um and exhibited ultimate tensile strengths of 246-256 MPa with elongations of 23-28 %. In these thin wires, Zn content had only a limited effect on grain size, tensile properties, and bending behavior, although lower-Zn alloys showed a pronounced sharp yield point. Bending was governed mainly by extrusion texture and preserved reversible plasticity through twinning and detwinning. Simulated body fluid caused rapid localized degradation and loss of mechanical integrity within 7 days, while the biologically more relevant DMEM-based medium better reflected the expected in vivo response. Together, these findings support dilute Mg-Zn wires as a simple material platform for the development of future resorbable bone fixation devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀释Mg-Zn合金线材中Zn含量（低于室温溶解度极限）对微观结构、力学性能和体外降解行为的影响，发现Zn含量对晶粒尺寸和拉伸性能影响有限，但低Zn合金表现出明显的屈服点，且降解行为受介质影响显著，为可吸收骨固定器件提供了材料基础。
AI.motivation: 开发可用于可吸收骨固定的稀释Mg-Zn合金线材，利用镁的可降解性促进骨骼愈合，同时通过低锌添加提供生物学益处而不损害生物相容性。
AI.method: 通过单步直接热挤压制备Mg-0.4Zn、Mg-0.6Zn、Mg-0.8Zn和Mg-1.5Zn四种合金细线，采用相关显微结构分析、拉伸测试、弯曲实验和体外降解实验进行表征。
AI.result: 所有合金均获得细等轴再结晶晶粒（5.0-5.9 μm），抗拉强度246-256 MPa，延伸率23-28%；Zn含量对晶粒尺寸和力学性能影响有限，低Zn合金存在明显屈服点；在模拟体液中7天内发生快速局部降解并丧失力学完整性，DMEM培养基更接近体内响应。
AI.conclusion: 稀释Mg-Zn线材可作为一种简单的材料平台，用于开发未来的可吸收骨固定器件。

title: Renormalized entropy production for optimal transport in jump processes: Make conservative forces optimal again
summary: For continuous-space diffusion processes, there is a strong connection between conservative forces and entropy production. For a given time evolution of the system's state, the entropy production is minimized when the system is driven by a unique conservative force. However, this relation does not extend to jump processes on a discrete state space. In this case, the forces that minimize the entropy production are generally nonconservative, this effect is more pronounced far from equilibrium in the presence of high energy barriers. Here we show that, while conservative forces do not minimize the entropy production for a given time evolution, they are nevertheless uniquely characterized as the minimizer of a quantity we dub the renormalized entropy production. This work explores the properties this quantity shares with entropy production as well as crucial differences between them. We also discuss the conceptual and physical differences between the corresponding optimization problems in finite time. Our theoretical calculations are illustrated with explicit numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 针对离散状态空间中的跳跃过程，保守力不再最小化熵产生。本文提出"重整化熵产生"这一新概念，保守力恰好是该量的最小化者，并探讨了其与标准熵产生的异同。
AI.motivation: 连续空间扩散过程中保守力最小化熵产生，但这一关系在离散状态空间的跳跃过程中不成立。作者旨在寻找离散情形下保守力对应的优化量。
AI.method: 引入"重整化熵产生"（renormalized entropy production）这一新概念，从理论上证明保守力是其唯一的最小化者，并通过数值例子进行验证。
AI.result: 在离散跳跃过程中，保守力虽不最小化标准熵产生，但唯一地最小化重整化熵产生。该效应在远离平衡且存在高能垒时更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一个新的优化量（重整化熵产生），使得保守力在离散空间中也具有类似于连续空间中的最小化特性，揭示了两种框架下熵产生优化的本质差异。

title: Signatures of time-reversal-symmetry breaking in multiband 2H-TaS2 revealed by zero-field Josephson nonreciprocity
summary: Superconductors that spontaneously break time-reversal symmetry host complex order parameters and are widely regarded as a hallmark of unconventional superconductivity. Whether such symmetry breaking can also arise in superconductors with nominally isotropic spin-singlet pairing remains an open question. Here we report a zero-field Josephson diode effect in noncentrosymmetric 2H-TaS2/2H-NbSe2 van der Waals junctions. The diode efficiency shows no systematic correlation with supercurrent amplitude, TaS2 thickness, or normal-state resistance, arguing against simple extrinsic, purely interfacial, or transparency-driven mechanisms. Time-reversal-symmetric scenarios are further tested using symmetry-controlled and molecule-intercalated control devices, in which the nonreciprocal response is absent or strongly reduced. Normal-state Hall transport in TaS2 exhibits a nonlinear response consistent with multiband correlated electronic states. Within a Josephson framework, our modelling shows that interband scattering acts as a phase-locking mechanism generating an intrinsic anomalous phase difference and a nonsinusoidal asymmetric current-phase relation, leading to finite zero-field rectification. Together, zero-field Josephson nonreciprocity and nonlinear Hall transport provide complementary evidence for a multiband superconducting phase structure in 2H-TaS2, consistent with intrinsic time-reversal-symmetry breaking.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在非中心对称2H-TaS₂/2H-NbSe₂范德瓦尔斯结中观测到零场约瑟夫森二极管效应，并证明该效应源于多能带超导相中内禀的时间反演对称性破缺。
AI.motivation: 探索各向同性自旋单态配对超导体中是否也能自发打破时间反演对称性，这是一个尚未解决的关键问题。
AI.method: 构建非中心对称2H-TaS₂/2H-NbSe₂范德瓦尔斯结，测量约瑟夫森二极管效率；利用对称性控制和分子插层控制器件进行对照实验；结合正常态霍尔输运测量（非线性响应）和约瑟夫森理论建模（带间散射作为锁相机制产生异常相位差和非正弦电流-相位关系）。
AI.result: 零场约瑟夫森二极管效率与超流振幅、TaS₂厚度、正常态电阻均无系统性关联，排除了外禀或界面透明度假说；对照实验显示非互易响应缺失或显著减弱；正常态霍尔输运呈现非线性行为；理论模型验证了带间散射导致内禀反常相位差和非对称电流-相位关系。
AI.conclusion: 零场约瑟夫森非互易性与非线性霍尔输运共同提供了2H-TaS₂中多能带超导相结构的互补证据，支持内禀时间反演对称性破缺的存在。

title: A Noble-Gas-Centered Coordinate for Within-Period Atomic Property Trends
summary: We introduce a single dimensionless landscape function $J_{\rm chem}(ρ) = \cosh(ρ\ln \varphi) - 1$, $\varphi = (1+\sqrt{5})/2$, on the noble-gas-centred coordinate $ρ= d/L_p \in [0,1)$, and show that it organizes four central atomic observables: first ionization energy \IE$_1$, electron affinity EA, Mulliken electronegativity $χ_M$, and Pearson chemical hardness $η$, on one periodic-table axis. The outward step $ΔJ_{\rm chem}^{+}$ delivers IE$_1$; the inward gap $ΔJ_{\rm chem}^{-} = J_{\rm chem}(1) - J_{\rm chem}(ρ)$ delivers EA and $η$; $χ_M$ follows by Mulliken's identity. Three results establish the empirical content. (i) The within-period IE$_1$ envelope reproduces the full noble-gas-to-alkali ordering across periods 2--6: of 34 atoms compiled across periods 2-4, 26 lie on the predicted monotone descent and the 8 upward deviations occur exactly at the textbook anomaly sites $\{p^3, d^5, f^7, s^2, d^{10}\}$. (ii) Two golden-ratio identities, ${\rm IE}_1(G_p)/{\rm IE}_1(G_{p+1}) \approx \varphi^{1/4}$ on three heavy noble-gas pairs and ${\rm IE}_1(\text{halogen})/{\rm IE}_1(\text{alkali}) \approx \varphi^2$ on four within-period pairs, agree with NIST data to MAD $\approx 1\%$ and $\approx 5\%$, respectively. (iii) The shared kernel $ΔJ_{\rm chem}^{-}$ provides single-parameter analytical fits to EA across periods 4--6 (MAE $0.3$--$0.4$~eV), to Pearson hardness $η$ across periods 2--4 (MAE $\sim 1$~eV on noble-gas maxima up to $10.8$~eV), and to Mulliken $χ_M$ across a 15-atom four-class benchmark ($R^2 = 0.73$). \edit{At the period-averaged scale level, the shared-kernel relation ${\rm EA}/η\approx C^{(p)}_{\mathrm{EA}}/C^{(p)}_η$ is supported on period-4 NIST data: the empirical nine-atom mean $\overline{{\rm EA}/η} = 0.180$ agrees with the predicted constant $0.182$ to better than $1\%$, although individual-atom scatter ($σ\approx 0.13$) is much larger.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于黄金分割比例的无量纲景观函数 J_chem(ρ)，用于统一描述第一电离能、电子亲和能、Mulliken电负性和Pearson化学硬度四种原子性质，并通过三个实证结果验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 作者希望找到一个统一的数学框架，将多个重要的原子性质（电离能、电子亲和能、电负性、化学硬度）整合在同一个周期表轴上，揭示它们背后的共同结构。
AI.method: 引入一个以黄金比例φ为基础的函数J_chem(ρ)，以惰性气体为中心坐标ρ定义，通过向外步进ΔJ+给出第一电离能，通过向内间隙ΔJ-给出电子亲和能和化学硬度，电负性由Mulliken恒等式得到。
AI.result: (i) 周期内第一电离能变化趋势与34个原子中26个的观测数据吻合；(ii) 两个黄金比例恒等式与NIST数据平均绝对偏差约1%和5%；(iii) 共享核ΔJ-能拟合电子亲和能（MAE 0.3-0.4 eV）、化学硬度（MAE ~1 eV）和电负性（R²=0.73），周期平均的EA/η比率与预测值误差小于1%。
AI.conclusion: 该景观函数J_chem(ρ)能够有效地组织多种原子性质，并具有预测能力，表明原子性质的周期性结构可能由一个潜在的统一数学规律支配。

title: Quantized Collective Fluctuations in Correlated Fermion Systems
summary: Collective excitations in fermionic systems play a crucial role in determining their physical properties. An important challenge is to develop efficient theoretical approaches for describing these excitations and their coupling to fermionic degrees of freedom. In this work, we revisit the problem of quantifying the contributions of individual bosonic modes of collective fluctuations to observable properties of correlated fermion systems within the framework of the Fluctuating Local Field (FLF) method. Whereas the auxiliary field in this method was previously considered only classically, we formulate its systematic extension termed Quantum FLF (Q-FLF) that incorporates selected bosonic Matsubara modes, thus tailoring it to description of quantum collective fluctuations. As a testbed, we apply the approach to a half-filled one-dimensional Hubbard chain and compute the Green's function, the total energy, and the antiferromagnetic susceptibility. Our results demonstrate that the proposed scheme enables an efficient and selective characterization of the contributions of individual bosonic modes. In particular, low Matsubara frequencies are found to have a quantitative impact on integrated observables such as total energy and antiferromagnetic susceptibility. At the same time, an accurate description of single-particle properties requires inclusion of higher-frequency bosonic modes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出量子涨落局域场（Q-FLF）方法，通过有选择地包含玻色子Matsubara模式来扩展经典FLF方法，从而更高效地描述费米子系统中集体激发的量子涨落及其对可观测量的贡献。在一维半填充Hubbard链上的测试表明，该方法能够选择性表征单个玻色子模式的贡献：低频模式对总能量和反铁磁磁化率等积分可观测量有定量影响，而准确描述单粒子性质需要包含高频玻色子模式。
AI.motivation: 费米子系统中集体激发（玻色子模式）对物理性质至关重要，但如何高效地量化这些激发模式及其与费米子自由度的耦合是一个重要挑战。现有FLF方法仅将辅助场视为经典处理，无法描述量子集体涨落，因此需要发展其量子扩展。
AI.method: 在FLF框架基础上，提出量子扩展（Q-FLF），有选择地纳入玻色子Matsubara模式，将辅助场从经典处理提升到包含量子涨落的描述。以一维半填充Hubbard链为测试系统，计算格林函数、总能量和反铁磁磁化率。
AI.result: Q-FLF方法能够高效且有选择地表征单个玻色子模式的贡献。低频Matsubara模式对总能量和反铁磁磁化率等积分可观测量有定量影响，而准确描述单粒子性质需要包含高频玻色子模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过有选择地包含不同频率的玻色子模式，Q-FLF方法能够在保持计算效率的同时，灵活地处理不同类型观测量的需求，为描述关联费米子系统中的量子集体涨落提供了一种新的有效工具。

title: Polarization-controlled effective Rabi dynamics in driven Graphene: A Floquet-Magnus approach
summary: Polarization ellipticity $β$ and the relative angle $Δ$ between electron momentum and driving field act as independent control parameters for coherent dynamics in periodically driven Dirac systems. In this work, we analyze the dynamics of resonantly driven Dirac electrons in graphene under elliptically polarized electromagnetic radiation using the Floquet-Magnus expansion. Working in the interaction picture and applying a rotating-wave-type transformation, we derive an effective two-level Hamiltonian that governs the macromotion at resonance ($ω= Ω/2$). The resulting quasienergy splitting depends nontrivially on $β$ and $Δ$ through interference between the Bessel harmonics $J_0(ζ)$ and $J_2(ζ)$. Circular polarization ($β= \pm 1$) restores rotational symmetry and yields a $Δ$-independent effective Rabi frequency, whereas elliptical and linear polarizations produce anisotropic responses with a $π$-periodic angular modulation. Beyond spectral properties, we identify a polarization-induced phase that acts as an effective initial Floquet kick, shifting the effective initial conditions and producing measurable shifts in the timing of occupation oscillations, whose sign depends on both helicity and relative orientation. Through an explicit Fourier decomposition of the time-evolution operator, we separate macromotion from micromotion contributions and validate the zeroth-order Magnus approximation via numerical simulations, achieving root-mean-square errors of $\sim 1\%$ over 100 driving periods in the weak-field regime. These results establish polarization ellipticity and relative orientation as tunable and experimentally accessible knobs for quantum control in two-dimensional Dirac materials, with direct implications for time-resolved spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Floquet-Magnus展开分析椭圆极化光驱动石墨烯中狄拉克电子的共振动力学，发现极化椭圆度β和电子动量与驱动场相对角Δ可作为独立控制参数，通过贝塞尔谐波J₀和J₂的干涉影响准能量分裂，并揭示极化诱导的初始Floquet相位可调控占据振荡的时序。
AI.motivation: 探索椭圆极化光驱动下狄拉克电子的相干动力学，揭示极化椭圆度和相对取向作为独立控制参数的作用，为二维狄拉克材料的量子控制提供可调谐的实验手段。
AI.method: 采用Floquet-Magnus展开，在相互作用表象中应用旋波型变换，推导出描述共振（ω=Ω/2）处宏运动的有效两能级哈密顿量；通过时间演化算符的傅里叶分解分离宏运动与微运动，并进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 准能量分裂通过J₀(ζ)与J₂(ζ)的干涉依赖于β和Δ；圆极化恢复旋转对称性产生各向同性Rabi频率，椭圆/线极化产生π周期角调制；发现极化诱导相位作为有效初始Floquet冲击，其符号依赖于手性和相对取向；零阶Magnus近似在弱场下100个周期内RMS误差约1%。
AI.conclusion: 极化椭圆度和相对取向可作为可调谐的实验控制旋钮，用于二维狄拉克材料的量子控制，对时间分辨光谱学有直接意义。

title: Unsupervised Learning of Quantum Phase Transitions for Bose-Hubbard lattice systems
summary: Characterizing quantum many-body phase structure is a major goal for quantum simulation. Here, we employ an unsupervised learning approach based on diffusion maps to learn phase transitions in bosonic lattice systems described by Bose-Hubbard type models, which can be realized in ultracold atoms and related quantum simulation platforms. We demonstrate that this approach identifies phase structure across distinct settings without prior knowledge of order parameters or handcrafted observables, including ground-state transitions involving symmetry-protected topological phases and nonequilibrium regimes distinguishing ergodic and many-body localized behavior. Our results indicate that the approach has the potential for direct application to experimentally accessible measurement data for learning quantum phases in current quantum simulators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散映射的无监督学习方法，用于识别玻色-哈伯德型晶格系统的量子多体相结构，无需预知序参量或手动构造观测量，可应用于基态相变（包括对称保护拓扑相）和非平衡区域（热化与多体局域化区分），并有望直接用于量子模拟器的实验测量数据。
AI.motivation: 表征量子多体相结构是量子模拟的主要目标，现有方法通常需要先验知识（如序参量或手工观测量），缺乏通用性。本文旨在开发一种无监督学习方法，自动从数据中学习相结构，无需人为干预。
AI.method: 采用扩散映射（diffusion maps）这一无监督学习技术，对玻色-哈伯德型模型的量子多体数据进行分析，自动识别相变边界和相结构。
AI.result: 该方法在多个不同场景下成功识别出相结构：包括基态相变（含对称保护拓扑相），以及非平衡区域中热化与多体局域化行为的区分。无需序参量或手工构造观测量。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督学习方法具有潜力直接应用于当前量子模拟器的实验测量数据，用于学习量子相，为量子多体相结构的自动识别提供了一条可行路径。

title: Tailoring Mechanical Properties of Germanium Anodes via Metal Incorporation for Improved Cycle Stability
summary: Achieving long-term stability in high-capacity lithium-ion battery anodes remains a critical challenge. In this study, we present a materials-intrinsic strategy for extending the cycle life of Ge, a promising next-generation anode material, through trace doping with metal elements. We systematically investigated the effects of small additions of various metals and found that elements with large atomic size, particularly Yb, markedly improved the cycling stability without sacrificing the initial capacity, while appropriate Yb doping enhanced the anode lifetime by approximately a factor of three. Structural and electrochemical analyses revealed that this improvement originates from mechanical softening of the Ge anode, which suppresses lithiation-induced damage such as cracking and delamination. Nanoindentation measurements further showed a strong negative correlation between dopant atomic size and film hardness, establishing anode softening as a new design principle for damage-tolerant electrodes. Although Yb doping reduced the rate capability at high C-rates, the present results demonstrate a clear shift in design strategy from volume-change suppression to mechanical compliance. These findings provide a useful framework for stabilizing high-capacity alloy anodes through atomic-scale mechanical control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过微量掺杂大原子尺寸金属元素（如Yb）使锗负极机械软化，从而抑制充放电损伤，将循环寿命提升约三倍，建立了从"抑制体积变化"转向"机械顺应性"的电极设计新策略。
AI.motivation: 高容量锂离子电池负极（如Ge）的长期稳定性是当前关键挑战，传统上试图抑制体积膨胀但效果有限，亟需新的设计思路。
AI.method: 系统研究多种微量金属掺杂对Ge负极的影响，结合结构分析、电化学测试和纳米压痕测量，建立掺杂原子尺寸与电极硬度/循环寿命的关联。
AI.result: 大原子尺寸元素（尤其是Yb）掺杂显著提升循环稳定性，使负极寿命延长约三倍；同时发现掺杂原子尺寸与薄膜硬度呈强负相关，机械软化是损伤抑制的关键机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出"机械顺应性"而非"体积变化抑制"作为高容量合金负极的设计原则，为通过原子尺度力学调控实现电极稳定化提供了新框架。

title: Reconstruction of spin structures from topological charge distributions via generative neural network systems
summary: Localized topological defects inherently possess a multiscale character. While their microstructure configuration depends on the specific physical system, their topological features and mutual interactions can be described on the macroscale in terms of a particle representation. However, determining the physical properties associated with a given defect pattern often requires knowledge of the underlying microscopic structure. In this work, we extend a Wasserstein generative adversarial neural network by incorporating physical constraints and Fourier-space information to generate microscopic spin configurations consistent with prescribed macroscopic patterns and thermodynamic parameters. Using the two-dimensional XY model as a test case, where vortex-antivortex pairs act as long-range interacting defects, we show that the model generates spin configurations that accurately reproduce magnetization, susceptibility, helicity modulus, and spin-spin correlations over a wide range of temperatures below the Kosterlitz-Thouless transition. At the same time, deviations in the specific heat reveal limitations in reproducing higher order energy fluctuations. A complementary analysis based on topological data analysis uncovers subtle differences in global spin-correlation structures at near critical temperatures that are not apparent from conventional correlation functions alone. These results demonstrate both the promise and current limitations of generative approaches for multiscale studies of defect-dominated spin systems and at the same time highlight topological methods as valuable tools for characterizing critical behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合物理约束和傅里叶空间信息的Wasserstein生成对抗网络，用于生成与指定宏观模式和热力学参数一致的微观自旋构型。以二维XY模型为测试案例，该模型在KT转变温度以下能准确再现磁化率、螺旋模量和自旋关联等物理量，但在比热方面存在局限。拓扑数据分析揭示了传统关联函数无法捕捉的临界温度附近自旋关联结构的细微差异。
AI.motivation: 局域拓扑缺陷具有多尺度特性，微观构型依赖具体物理系统，而拓扑特征和相互作用可通过宏观粒子表示描述。然而，确定缺陷模式的物理性质通常需要微观结构知识。现有方法在连接宏观缺陷模式与微观自旋构型方面存在困难，亟需一种能够从宏观条件生成微观构型的生成式方法。
AI.method: 扩展Wasserstein生成对抗网络(WGAN)，融入物理约束和傅里叶空间信息，生成与预设宏观模式和热力学参数一致的微观自旋构型。以二维XY模型为测试案例，其中涡旋-反涡旋对作为长程相互作用缺陷。
AI.result: 模型在KT转变温度以下(较宽温度范围)能准确生成自旋构型，并再现磁化率、磁化强度、螺旋模量和自旋-自旋关联函数。但在比热方面存在偏差，反映出高阶能量波动的再现能力有限。拓扑数据分析揭示了临界温度附近传统关联函数无法察觉的全局自旋关联结构细微差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了生成式方法在缺陷主导自旋系统多尺度研究中的前景与当前局限，同时凸显了拓扑方法作为表征临界行为重要工具的价值。

title: Long range proximity effects in planar structures involving the halfmetal ferromagnet La0.7Sr0.3MnO3 and Pt interlayers
summary: Over the last decade, there has been steady research on superconducting junctions with a ferromagnet as the weak link, and where triplet correlations can transport supercurrents over a substantial distances. Of particular interest are halfmetallic ferromagnets, in which only one spin band is present, so that, presumably, the induced supercurrent is fully spin-polarized. We have earlier reported on a study of triplet transport in planar La0.7Sr0.3MnO3(LSMO) nanostrip Josephson junctions with NbTi superconducting contacts, where we found high values for the supercurrents, and large junction lengths (up to 1.3 μm). Here, we extend that work by studying the dependence of the critical current Ic on the length of the nanostrip between the contacts and the width of the strip. All junctions show strong supercurrents, but we do not observe simple systematics. Apparently, the fabrication process does not allow sufficient control over some of its parameters. To gain more insight in the mechanism for triplet generation at the LSMO/NbTi interface, we also studied the effect of Pt as an interlayer between the LSMO and the NbTi. For this, we etched a NbTi/Pt electrode structure on a full film of LSMO. The results are highly promising, showing sharp superconducting transitions and zero-resistance states being reached at an electrode distance of 2 μm, with indications that larger distances should be feasible.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三重态超电流在铁磁体/超导体异质结中的输运特性，重点分析了La0.7Sr0.3MnO3（LSMO）纳米带Josephson结的临界电流与结尺寸的关系，并探索了在LSMO/NbTi界面引入Pt中间层以改善三重态产生机制的可行性。
AI.motivation: 探索半金属铁磁体LSMO中完全自旋极化的超电流输运机制，理解三重态在超导/铁磁界面产生的物理条件，并尝试通过界面工程（引入Pt中间层）优化器件性能。
AI.method: 制备了NbTi/LSMO/NbTi平面Josephson结，改变纳米带的长度和宽度，测量临界电流Ic的依赖性；并在LSMO与NbTi之间插入Pt中间层，形成NbTi/Pt/LSMO结构，研究其超导输运特性。
AI.result: 所有结均表现出强超电流，但Ic与结几何尺寸之间缺乏简单的系统规律，表明制备工艺参数控制不足。引入Pt中间层后，在电极间距2 μm处观察到清晰的超导转变和零电阻态，且更远距离可能实现。
AI.conclusion: Pt中间层能有效改善LSMO/NbTi界面的三重态超电流产生效率，有望实现更长距离的自旋极化超电流输运，但需要对制备工艺进行进一步优化以获得可重复的系统性。

title: Novel Chemical Pathways for the Formation of Nucleobase Precursors via Benzene π-Bond Addition to HCN
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in Icarus Special issue entitled 'Carbon in Planetary Environments: Sources and Evolution.' We dedicate this paper to the memory of Professor Yuk L. Yung (1946-2026), who passed away on March 16, 2026
summary: We propose a simple and efficient pathway for the formation of precursors to core nucleobases in DNA and RNA using a suite of computational chemistry methods. Benzene, which is thermochemically stable in N2- or CO2-dominated atmospheres, could have formed via upper-atmospheric photochemistry or surface lightning and accumulated on the early Earth or Mars. However, nitrogen insertion into the benzene ring to form pyrimidine and purine is widely considered to be challenging. We propose that nitrogen incorporation occurred through HCN 1,4-cycloaddition to benzene's π-system, followed by a C2H2 fragmentation mechanism, as confirmed by quantum chemistry calculations. This pathway, potentially facilitated by photochemistry at the ocean surface or episodic impact events on local reservoirs, can lead to pyrimidine formation, which can further react with NH3 and HCN to produce purine. Extending this pathway to early Mars, our photochemical model simulates heterocyclic compound formation under cold, dry surface conditions that favor high benzene and HCN concentrations but lack liquid water. We thus propose that organics formed during dry phases may have later dissolved into surface waters during wet phases and become concentrated as ocean sediments. This result supports Mars Sample Return efforts focused on ancient aqueous environments likely to retain prebiotic signatures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算化学方法提出了一条从苯到嘧啶和嘌呤等核碱基前体的简洁高效形成路径，涉及HCN 1,4-环加成和C2H2碎片化机制，并探讨了该路径在早期地球和火星上的可行性，支持火星样本返回任务。
AI.motivation: 氮插入苯环形成嘧啶和嘌呤被认为是极具挑战性的步骤，作者希望提出一种可行的氮掺入机制来解释核碱基前体在早期地球和火星上的起源。
AI.method: 采用量子化学计算方法（计算化学套件）验证反应路径；利用光化学模型模拟火星寒冷干燥表面条件下杂环化合物的形成。
AI.result: 确认了HCN 1,4-环加成到苯的π体系后经C2H2碎片化机制可形成嘧啶；嘧啶可进一步与NH3和HCN反应生成嘌呤。火星光化学模型显示干燥条件下有利于苯和HCN的高浓度积累。
AI.conclusion: 该路径可能通过海洋表面光化学或局域撞击事件促进，为早期地球和火星提供核碱基前体；火星上的有机物在干旱期形成后可在湿润期溶解于地表水中并富集为海洋沉积物，支持针对古水环境的火星样本返回任务。

title: Electrical detection of spin-flip transition in metal/Na5Co15.5Te6O36 heterostructure
summary: We report on the longitudinal magnetoresistance (MR) in thin metal films on an Ising-type antiferromagnetic insulator, Na5Co15.5Te6O36 (NCTO). Steep changes in the MR spectra with hysteresis were observed at spin-flip transitions driven by magnetic fields applied along the easy axis of the NCTO crystal. The MR jumps almost follow step-like changes in magnetization at the spin-flip transition. At very low temperatures where Co moments are partially frozen, the MR anomalies exhibit a tunnel-magnetoresistance-like shape. The observed MR anomalies at the spin-flip transition are attributed to strain effects via magnetostriction upon the magnetic-structure change of the Co nets in NCTO, because similar MR jumps are observed in both Pt/NCTO and Cu/NCTO. Interestingly, we found that the high-field slopes of the MR spectra show opposite signs between Pt/NCTO and Cu/NCTO at low temperatures. Because the opposite signs of the high-field MR are prominent below the antiferromagnetic transition temperature of NCTO, the interaction between the interface spin accumulation and magnetization is likely to contribute to the MR effect in the induced ferromagnetic state.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在Ising型反铁磁绝缘体Na5Co15.5Te6O36（NCTO）上的金属薄膜的纵向磁电阻（MR），发现自旋翻转跃迁引起的MR异常，并归因于磁致伸缩应变效应，同时在低温下观察到Pt/NCTO和Cu/NCTO的高场MR斜率符号相反的现象。
AI.motivation: 探究金属薄膜与反铁磁绝缘体界面处的磁电阻效应，特别是自旋翻转跃迁对MR的影响，以及不同金属层（Pt与Cu）对MR行为的差异。
AI.method: 测量了Pt/NCTO和Cu/NCTO两种异质结的纵向磁电阻，在沿NCTO晶体易轴施加磁场条件下，观察自旋翻转跃迁过程中的MR变化。
AI.result: 发现了与自旋翻转跃迁对应的MR跳跃现象，且该跳跃几乎与磁化强度的阶梯式变化一致。低温下部分Co矩冻结时，MR异常呈现隧道磁电阻形状。Pt/NCTO和Cu/NCTO的高场MR斜率在低温下符号相反。
AI.conclusion: MR异常主要源于NCTO中Co网磁结构变化引起的磁致伸缩应变效应，而非单纯的电子输运效应。高场MR斜率的符号相反表明界面自旋累积与磁化之间的相互作用在诱导铁磁态中贡献了MR效应。

title: Investigation of nonlocal transport associated with the orbital Hall effect in Ti
summary: We investigate nonlocal transport in single-layer Ti Hall bars to explore signatures of orbital-current transport driven by the orbital Hall effect. Despite the negligible spin Hall effect in Ti, we observe a finite nonlocal resistance in the single-layer Ti Hall bar and study its dependence on the central channel width. Finite-element simulations show that the measured signal contains a sizable Ohmic bypass contribution. However, the bypass contribution is strongly suppressed at small channel widths and cannot fully account for the observed nonlocal resistance even when variations in the Ti resistivity are taken into account. Our results therefore suggest an additional nonlocal contribution distinct from the Ohmic bypass background, which may be associated with orbital transport driven by the orbital Hall effect in Ti.

AI.tldr: 本文在单层Ti霍尔条中研究了非局域输运，发现除了欧姆旁路贡献外，还存在可能与Ti中轨道霍尔效应驱动的轨道输运相关的额外非局域信号。
AI.motivation: 探索Ti中由轨道霍尔效应驱动的轨道电流输运特征，因为Ti的自旋霍尔效应可忽略，适合单独研究轨道效应。
AI.method: 在单层Ti霍尔条中测量非局域电阻，改变中心通道宽度，并结合有限元模拟分析贡献来源。
AI.result: 观察到有限非局域电阻；欧姆旁路贡献在窄通道中被显著抑制，但仍存在无法归因于旁路的额外非局域信号。
AI.conclusion: Ti中存在与轨道霍尔效应相关的轨道输运非局域贡献，超越了纯欧姆旁路背景。

title: Beyond Structure: Revolutionising Materials Discovery via AI-Driven Synthesis Protocol-Property Relationships
summary: The current structure-centric paradigm in artificial intelligence (AI)-driven materials discovery, despite delivering thousands of candidate structures, is stalling at a critical barrier: the synthesizability gap. We argue that closing this gap demands a pivot to a synthesis-first paradigm in which executable synthesis protocols, not just atomic configurations, are treated as primary design variables. We outline a roadmap built on three pillars: (i) representing synthesis procedures as machine-readable protocols, (ii) deploying generative and inverse-design models to propose actionable reaction pathways and recipes, and (iii) integrating closed-loop optimisation to refine protocols against experimental realities and sustainability constraints. Framed in terms of the causal backbone P->X->y from protocol P to structure X and properties y, this perspective sets out methodological building blocks, standards needs and self-driving laboratory (SDL) integration strategies to accelerate reproducible, data-first materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了当前AI驱动材料发现中"以结构为中心"的范式，指出其虽能预测海量候选结构但面临"可合成性鸿沟"——大量结构无法实际制备。作者主张转向"以合成为优先"的新范式，将可执行的合成协议（而非仅原子构型）作为核心设计变量，并提出了基于三大支柱的路线图：可机器读取的合成协议表示、生成式与逆向设计模型驱动的反应路径提议、闭环优化整合实验反馈与可持续性约束。
AI.motivation: 现有AI材料发现方法过度聚焦于预测新结构，却忽视了这些结构能否被实际合成出来，导致理论预测与实验验证之间存在严重脱节（可合成性鸿沟）。作者旨在通过范式转换，使AI不仅设计材料结构，更直接设计其合成路径。
AI.method: 提出"合成优先"范式，核心方法论包括：(i) 将合成步骤标准化为机器可读协议；(ii) 利用生成模型和逆向设计提出可行的反应路径与配方；(iii) 引入闭环自动化优化（自驱动实验室），基于实验反馈和可持续性约束迭代优化协议。该框架基于因果链P→X→y（协议→结构→性质）构建。
AI.result: 论文本身是观点性文章，未提供具体实验结果，而是给出了方法论构建模块、标准化需求以及自驱动实验室集成策略，旨在加速可重复、数据驱动的材料发现流程。
AI.conclusion: 要突破当前AI材料发现的瓶颈，必须从"结构中心"转向"合成优先"范式，将合成协议作为可操作的设计变量，通过协议标准化、生成式AI和闭环实验优化三管齐下，才能弥合预测与合成之间的鸿沟，实现真正可落地的材料发现。

title: Superconducting diode effect in correlated electron systems by nonreciprocal magnetism
summary: The superconducting diode effect (SDE), characterized by a nonreciprocal critical current in superconductors, has recently been observed in strongly correlated electron systems and near quantum criticality, pointing to unconventional mechanisms beyond weak-coupling theories. Here we investigate the SDE in the Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard model, which captures $d$-wave superconductivity in an antiferromagnetic quantum critical regime, using the Dyson-Gor'kov equation with the fluctuation exchange approximation. We show that electron correlations suppress the conventional intrinsic SDE arising from depairing currents. More importantly, a supercurrent nonreciprocally induces antiferromagnetic order, which fundamentally governs the critical current and enables perfect diode efficiency. Our results reveal a previously unrecognized correlation-driven mechanism of the SDE and establish strongly correlated superconductors as a platform for superconducting diode physics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard模型结合涨落交换近似的Dyson-Gor'kov方程，研究强关联超导体中的超导二极管效应(SDE)，发现电子关联抑制常规SDE，而超电流非互易地诱导反铁磁序，从而实现完美二极管效率，揭示了强关联驱动的SDE新机制。
AI.motivation: 超导二极管效应近期在强关联电子系统和量子临界点附近被观测到，暗示存在超出弱耦合理论的新机制，但尚未被充分理解，亟需理论解释。
AI.method: 采用Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard模型，利用Dyson-Gor'kov方程结合涨落交换近似(FLEX)进行理论分析。
AI.result: 1) 电子关联抑制了由退对电流产生的常规本征SDE；2) 超电流非互易地诱导反铁磁序，该序控制临界电流并实现完美二极管效率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一种此前未被认识的关联驱动SDE机制，并将强关联超导体确立为超导二极管物理的研究平台。

title: Thermodynamic Properties of Diatomic Molecules from the Frost-Musulin Potential
summary: In this study, we present a quantum-statistical analysis of H$_2$ and LiH diatomic molecules within the Frost--Musulin potential framework. By combining the analytical bound-state approach to the radial Schrödinger problem with the near-equilibrium Pekeris representation, we obtain a validated rotation-vibration spectrum that reproduces a physically consistent ordering of energy levels. These bound states are subsequently combined with standard translational and rotational ideal gas contributions to construct the total partition function and the corresponding thermodynamic observables of the ground state. The resulting formulation captures the Gibbs free energy deviation function for both molecules with high quantitative accuracy and provides chemically plausible trends for heat capacity and enthalpy increase over a wide temperature range. At the same time, residual errors become increasingly pronounced in derivative-sensitive quantities, particularly at high temperatures; this indicates that the dominant limitations now stem not from the local bound-state spectrum itself, but from the neglect of inelastic rotational, continuity contributions and dynamics close to dissociation. Consequently, the present results define the potential model as a compact and analytically tractable representation of the bound region, recovering a significant portion of the observed thermochemistry whilst also delineating the regime where more comprehensive molecular statistical mechanics is required.

AI.tldr: 本文在Frost-Musulin势框架下对H₂和LiH双原子分子进行量子统计分析，通过解析方法获得验证的振动-转动能谱，构建了配分函数和热力学可观测量。结果表明该模型在热化学预测方面表现良好，但在高温和解离区域存在局限。
AI.motivation: 现有双原子分子热力学模型在解析可处理性和定量精度之间存在矛盾，作者希望建立一个既紧凑、解析可处理，又能捕捉大部分热化学行为的势模型，并明确其适用范围。
AI.method: 采用Frost-Musulin势框架，结合径向薛定谔问题的解析束缚态方法与近平衡Pekeris表示，获得旋转-振动谱；再将束缚态与标准理想气体的平动和转动贡献结合，构建总配分函数并推导热力学量。
AI.result: 模型在Gibbs自由能偏差函数上具有高定量精度，热容和焓在宽温区内表现出化学合理的趋势；但在高温下，对导数敏感的量（如热容）残余误差显著增大。
AI.conclusion: Frost-Musulin势作为束缚区域的紧凑解析模型是可行的，能恢复大部分热化学信息；但为提升高温精度，需纳入非弹性转动、连续性贡献及解离附近动力学效应。

title: Induced discommensurations in the lock-in transition of charge-density waves
summary: We studied McMillan's free energy of the lock-in transition in charge-density waves. The wave profiles near the critical value were obtained by numerical annealing. First, we demonstrated that our method reproduces the previous studies. The obtained wave profiles include discommensurations near the critical value. Then, we calculated possible wave profiles in the commensurate state. We found that discommensurations are able to be excited in the commensurate state, leading the system to turn out to an incommensurate state. We proposed that these wave profiles result from topological invariants. Moreover, excitation of the discommensurations is favorable for the direction to the original wavelength of the incommensurate state. This is attributed to the nature of McMillan's free energy. The current-induced incommensurations, which we discovered with the diffraction study of $o$-TaS$_3$ [Inagaki \textit{et al.}, J. Phys. Soc. Jpn. 77, 093708 (2008)], is consistent with this study.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值退火方法研究McMillan自由能下电荷密度波中锁定相变（lock-in transition）的波包结构，发现临界值附近存在失配位错（discommensurations），并证明公度态中可激发失配位错导致系统转变为非公度态，该过程与拓扑不变量相关，且与o-TaS₃中的电流诱导非公度实验结果一致。
AI.motivation: 理解电荷密度波中锁定相变（公度-非公度转变）的微观机制，特别是失配位错在转变过程中的作用及其物理起源。
AI.method: 基于McMillan自由能模型，采用数值退火（numerical annealing）方法计算临界值附近的波包轮廓，并与前人研究进行对比验证。
AI.result: 1. 数值方法复现了前人结果；2. 临界值附近波包包含失配位错；3. 公度态中可激发失配位错导致系统转向非公度态；4. 这些波包轮廓来源于拓扑不变量；5. 失配位错的激发方向倾向于原始非公度态的波长。
AI.conclusion: 失配位错的激发是公度-非公度转变的关键机制，其拓扑起源和能量学特性与McMillan自由能的性质一致，并成功解释了o-TaS₃中电流诱导非公度结构的实验现象。

title: Thermodynamic Charge Partition in Accumulation-Layer Heterostructures
summary: We develop a thermodynamic description of accumulation-layer heterostructures in which the induced sheet density is partitioned between the near-interface accumulation-layer charge and a complementary screening charge in the surrounding structure. Treating this partition as the central state variable yields a complete Helmholtz free energy, a corrected locked-branch chemical potential, and a shifted release potential that separates energetic path selection from geometric capacitance. The physical path is selected spectrally: compressible segments remain fully screened, whereas incompressible segments evolve along a locked branch until release is triggered by the relevant gap. Differential capacitance, tunnel current and plateau width then emerge as different projections of the same coupled thermodynamic structure. A canonical two-stage self-consistent Poisson--Schrödinger reduction supplies universal master functions for the isolated accumulation layer and master surfaces for its finite-buffer extension, making the theory calculable across density and geometry. Comparison with magnetocapacitance and magnetotunneling data supports a picture in which nearby extended charge refills the accumulation layer and the effective screening depth grows with magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一个热力学框架来描述积累层异质结构中的电荷分配，将感应面密度划分为界面附近积累层电荷和周围结构中的屏蔽电荷两部分，并推导了完整的亥姆霍兹自由能、修正的锁定支路化学势和释放势，通过谱方法选择物理路径。结合自洽泊松-薛定谔约化，该理论可计算不同密度和几何下的微分电容、隧穿电流和平板宽度。与磁电容和磁隧穿数据的比较表明，附近扩展电荷会重新填充积累层，且有效屏蔽长度随磁场增大而增大。
AI.motivation: 现有理论未能统一描述积累层异质结构中电荷分配的热力学机制，特别是在考虑屏蔽效应和能隙触发释放过程时缺乏完整的热力学框架。本文旨在建立一个将电荷分配作为核心状态变量的热力学描述，以统一理解微分电容、隧穿电流和平板宽度等不同物理量。
AI.method: 将积累层与周围结构的电荷分配作为中心状态变量，构建完整的亥姆霍兹自由能；推导修正的锁定支路化学势和释放势；基于谱方法选择物理路径：可压缩段保持完全屏蔽，不可压缩段沿锁定支路演化直到被能隙触发释放。开发了一套规范的两阶段自洽泊松-薛定谔约化方法，得到积累层的通用主函数和有限缓冲扩展的主曲面。
AI.result: 建立了一个统一的热力学框架，其中微分电容、隧穿电流和平板宽度是同一耦合热力学结构的不同投影。通过磁电容和磁隧穿数据的验证，支持了附近扩展电荷重新填充积累层、有效屏蔽深度随磁场增大而增大的物理图像。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的热力学描述能够统一解释积累层异质结构中的多种物理现象，揭示了屏蔽深度随磁场变化的关键机制，为理解和设计相关异质结构器件提供了理论基础。

title: Kinetically Arrested Twin-Domain State in Formamidinium Lead Iodide
summary: Hybrid lead halide perovskites exhibit a delicate interplay between average crystallographic symmetry, local structural disorder and A-site orientational dynamics, giving rise to unusual vibrational and electronic behaviour. Here, we combine large-scale molecular dynamics with a density-functional-theory-accurate machine learning force field to resolve the structural dynamics of perovskites across mesoscopic length scales. In formamidinium lead iodide FAPbI$_{3}$, we identify a high-temperature $α$ phase with dynamic local order and correlated tilt nanodomains, an ordered $γ$ phase with long-range $a^{+}a^{+}a^{+}$ tilt coherence, and, below $\sim$100~K, a history-dependent $γ'$ state consisting of locally $γ$-like nanoscale regions separated by sharp twin-like boundaries. This low-temperature disordered state is not a distinct bulk polymorph, but a kinetically arrested metastable twin-domain network selected by the interplay between shallow tilt energetics and slowing FA reorientation. This picture provides a consistent explanation for the low-temperature diffuse scattering features observed experimentally, and accounts for the broadened low-energy vibrational response found in the simulations. Furthermore, this unique structural landscape imprints a spatially varying electronic disorder that directly impacts macroscopic optoelectronic properties, evidenced by an anomalous increase in the Urbach energy at low temperatures. Our results reconcile the debated low-temperature behaviour of FAPbI$_{3}$ in terms of competition between ordered and arrested structural states, and show more broadly that in hybrid perovskites the organic cation can actively select the macroscopic structural and electronic response through its reorientation kinetics, placing thermal history on equal footing with composition as a determinant of structural and optoelectronic properties.

AI.tldr: 本文结合大规模分子动力学与机器学习力场，解析了FAPbI₃钙钛矿从高温α相到低温γ'态的结构动力学，揭示了有机阳离子取向动力学如何通过浅倾斜能垒与缓慢重取向的竞争，导致动力学亚稳态孪晶网络的形成，从而影响材料的电子无序和光电性质。
AI.motivation: 混合卤化物钙钛矿中平均晶体对称性、局部结构无序与A位取向动力学之间存在微妙的相互作用，导致异常振动和电子行为。现有实验对低温行为存在争议，需要理论模型从原子尺度阐明结构动力学与光电性质的关联机制。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论精度机器学习力场驱动的大规模分子动力学模拟，在介观尺度上解析FAPbI₃的结构动力学，包括高温α相、有序γ相及低温γ'态的相变行为。
AI.result: 1) 高温α相具有动态局域有序和关联倾斜纳米域；2) γ相呈现长程a⁺a⁺a⁺倾斜相干；3) 低温γ'态为动力学停滞的亚稳态孪晶畴网络，并非体相多晶型；4) 浅倾斜能垒与FA重取向减缓的竞争导致此结构；5) 结构无序导致空间变化的电子无序，Urbach能量在低温下异常增大。
AI.conclusion: FAPbI₃的低温行为可归结为有序相与动力学停滞结构状态之间的竞争。有机阳离子通过其重取向动力学主动选择宏观结构和电子响应，使热历史与组成成为决定结构和光电性质的同等重要因素。

title: Resolving Open Problems on the Hyper-Zagreb Index and its Chemical Applications
summary: Topological indices are numerical invariants derived from molecular graphs and play an important role in characterizing chemical compounds and predicting their properties. Among the earliest descriptors are the classical Zagreb indices introduced by Gutman and Trinajstić in 1972. A more recent development is the hyper-Zagreb index ($HM$), defined as $HM(G)=\sum_{v_i v_j\in E(G)}(d_i+d_j)^2$, where $d_i$ denotes the degree of vertex $v_i$. In 2023, Hayat et al. posed an open problem concerning bounds on the $HM$ index under fixed vertex-connectivity or edge-connectivity, along with the characterization of the corresponding extremal graphs. In this work, the problem is resolved by determining the extremal graphs that maximize $HM$ index under these constraints. The investigation is further extended to several additional extremal problems, including graphs with a given number of leaves, chromatic number, and independence number. The associated extremal graphs are identified in each case. In addition, the chemical relevance of $HM$ is examined through QSPR studies. Finally, the conclusion is presented.

AI.tldr: 本文解决了2023年Hayat等人提出的关于超Zagreb指数（HM）在固定顶点连通度或边连通度下的极值问题，并进一步推广到叶子数、色数、独立数等约束下的极值问题，同时进行了QSPR研究验证其化学相关性。
AI.motivation: 解决Hayat等人（2023年）提出的关于超Zagreb指数在固定顶点连通度/边连通度下的界限及其极值图刻画的公开问题。
AI.method: 通过图论分析与极值组合方法，确定在顶点连通度、边连通度、叶子数、色数、独立数等约束下最大化HM指数的极值图结构。
AI.result: 完整刻画了各约束条件下的极值图，并进行了QSPR研究验证HM指数的化学预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了公开问题，并将结果推广至多种图参数约束情形，同时通过QSPR研究确认了HM指数的化学应用价值。

title: Incommensurate Magnetic Ordered Phase with Enhanced Low-Temperature Magnetic Specific Heat in SmAu$_3$Al$_7$
summary: Neutron scattering and muon spin rotation ($μ$SR) measurements on single-crystal SmAu$_3$Al$_7$ reveal magnetically ordered states associated with successive transitions at $T_{\rm N}$ = 2.8 K and $T^*$ = 0.9 K. Magnetic Bragg peaks appear below $T_{\rm N}$ with an incommensurate (IC) propagation vector ${\bf q}$ = (0.30, 0, 1.33). $μ$SR detects spontaneous internal fields below $T_{\rm N}$, and the spectral shape is consistent with the IC magnetic ordering. No anomalies are observed at $T^*$, indicating that the magnetic structure remains essentially unchanged below and above $T^*$. The magnetic order is revealed to be a spatially homogeneous long-range ordered state, rather than a partially disordered state proposed in earlier studies. The possible connection between the IC magnetic order and the enhanced low-temperature magnetic specific heat is discussed.

AI.tldr: 通过中子散射和μSR实验，发现SmAu₃Al₇单晶中存在非公度(IC)长程磁有序（q=(0.30,0,1.33)），在T_N=2.8K和T*≈0.9K处出现连续磁转变，且T*处无结构变化，表明该体系是均匀的长程有序态而非部分无序态，并讨论了IC磁序与低温磁比热增强的可能关联。
AI.motivation: 澄清SmAu₃Al₇的磁有序本质，检验其是否为部分无序态，并理解IC磁序与低温磁比热异常的关系。
AI.method: 对SmAu₃Al₇单晶进行中子散射和μSR测量。
AI.result: 发现T_N=2.8K下出现IC磁Bragg峰（q=(0.30,0,1.33)），μSR检测到自发内场且谱形与IC有序一致；T*≈0.9K处无异常，表明磁结构不变；确认其为空间均匀的长程有序态。
AI.conclusion: SmAu₃Al₇的磁有序是均匀的IC长程有序态，而非部分无序态；IC磁序可能与低温磁比热增强有关。

title: Suppressing spin qubit decoherence during shuttling via confinement modulation
comment: main 13 pages, 6 figures, 1 table appendix 5 pages
summary: Reliable long-range qubit shuttling is a powerful tool for scalable quantum computing architectures. We investigate strategies to improve the coherence of moving spin qubits by performing continuous dynamical decoupling by modulating their confinement potential. Specifically, we introduce temporal and spatial breathing shuttling protocols that leverage spin-orbit interactions in hole-spin systems to electrically drive the qubit while moving. This enables efficient dressed-state shuttling, where the spin is continuously rotated during transport, suppressing the effect of low-frequency noise. Using the filter function formalism, we identify driving regimes that efficiently mitigate both global and local magnetic and electric noise sources. We find that confinement-modulated shuttling can significantly enhance coherence during transport, while revealing distinct limitations depending on the correlation length of the noise. Applying our framework to germanium hole-spin qubits, we show that these protocols provide a practical route toward noise-resilient long-range coherent quantum links.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过调制限制势实现连续动态解耦的量子比特穿梭协议（时间/空间呼吸式穿梭），利用空穴自旋系统中的自旋-轨道相互作用在移动中持续驱动自旋，有效抑制低频噪声，并在锗空穴自旋量子比特中展示了实现抗噪声长距离相干量子链路的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有长距离量子比特穿梭面临退相干挑战，特别是低频噪声严重影响移动自旋的相干性，需要开发能够在运输过程中保持自旋相干性的新策略。
AI.method: 提出时间呼吸和空间呼吸两种穿梭协议，利用空穴自旋系统中的自旋-轨道相互作用，在移动过程中通过调制限制势进行连续动态解耦（持续旋转自旋），采用滤波函数形式化分析识别最优驱动参数。
AI.result: 限制势调制的穿梭能显著增强运输过程中的相干性，揭示了不同噪声相关长度下的局限性，并在锗空穴自旋量子比特中验证了这些协议的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这些协议为实现抗噪声的长距离相干量子链路提供了实用路径，对可扩展量子计算架构具有重要意义。

title: An Advanced Epitaxial Strategy Enabling Vertical GaN Devices on Silicon Wafers
summary: While vertical GaN-on-silicon architectures promise a transformative leap in cost-effective power electronics and high-resolution micro-LEDs, their deployment remains bottlenecked by the high electrical resistance of conventional epitaxial buffer layers. Here, a universal and straightforward sputtering-based strategy is presented to realize high quality GaN epitaxial films on Si(111) substrates characterized by exceptionally low vertical resistance, ohmic behavior, and robust thermal stability. This technique centers on the in-situ formation of a sub nanometer (0.5 nm) silicide-based template via rapid thermal annealing method demonstrating unprecedented versatility across 25 different metallic species. Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) reveals that a unique amorphous like interlayer (AL-IL) effectively accommodates lattice mismatch and relaxes epitaxial strain. These AL-IL templates further serve as high performance platforms for metalorganic chemical vapor deposition (MOCVD) overgrowth, successfully bridging the gap between scalable, low-cost fabrication and device-grade vertical performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于溅射和亚纳米硅化物模板的策略，在Si(111)上生长高质量GaN薄膜，实现超低垂直电阻、欧姆行为和良好热稳定性，突破传统缓冲层高电阻的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 垂直GaN-on-Si架构在功率电子和微型LED领域有巨大潜力，但传统外延缓冲层的高电阻严重制约了其实际部署。
AI.method: 通过快速热退火在Si(111)衬底上原位形成亚纳米（0.5 nm）硅化物模板，并利用STEM观察非晶状中间层（AL-IL）来缓解晶格失配和应变为，再通过MOCVD进行高质量GaN薄膜的过生长。
AI.result: 该方法在25种不同金属物种上均表现出普适性；形成的AL-IL有效缓解了晶格失配和外延应变；最终实现了超低垂直电阻、欧姆接触行为以及优异的热稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该溅射基策略成功桥接了低成本可扩展制造与器件级垂直性能之间的鸿沟，为GaN-on-Si技术的实用化铺平了道路。

title: Nuclear Spin Isomers and the Pauli Principle in Polaritonic Chemistry
summary: The Pauli principle has far-reaching consequences in quantum physics. Here, we investigate, for the first time, its implications, together with nuclear spin isomerism, in polaritonic chemistry. We first present an accurate numerical description in a realistic situation of two $^{14}$NH$_3$ molecules, existing as ortho and para spin isomers, in an infrared cavity. Then, we generalize these results using an analytical model for molecular ensembles. Our findings undoubtedly demonstrate that the Pauli principle and nuclear spin isomerism significantly reshape collective light-matter coupling.

AI.tldr: 本文首次研究了泡利原理和核自旋异构体在极化激元化学中的影响，发现它们会显著重塑集体光-物质耦合。
AI.motivation: 泡利原理对量子物理有深远影响，但其在极化激元化学中的含义尚未被研究。本文首次探索泡利原理与核自旋异构体在腔量子电动力学（极化激元化学）中的联合效应。
AI.method: 首先对红外腔中两个¹⁴NH₃分子（存在ortho和para自旋异构体）进行精确数值描述，然后利用解析模型将结果推广到分子 ensembles。
AI.result: 泡利原理和核自旋异构体会显著重塑集体光-物质耦合。
AI.conclusion: 泡利原理和核自旋异构体在极化激元化学中不可忽视，它们对集体耦合行为有重大影响。

title: Dynamical magnetotropic susceptibility as a new probe of Kitaev materials and beyond
summary: The magnetotropic susceptibility $k(ω)$ probes ultra-low-frequency uniform fluctuations. For a crystal mounted on an oscillating cantilever in a magnetic field, it is defined as the ratio of torque to angular-displacement amplitude. Its real and imaginary parts determine the oscillation-frequency shift and crystal-induced damping. It is a low-energy probe of uniform $q=0$ spin and charge degrees of freedom. We demonstrate this by deriving $k(ω)$ within linear response theory for a generic correlated-electron Hamiltonian with charge and spin degrees of freedom. Although it covers metallic and insulating magnets, correlated paramagnets, and exotic quantum critical points, we focus on limiting cases. For insulating spin systems $k(0)$ is sensitive to magnetic anisotropy whereas its finite-frequency imaginary part probes uniform dynamical spin susceptibility even in spin-symmetric models. For metallic systems we identify when eddy currents cause low-frequency damping. Our numerical results focus on Kitaev-material magnetotropic response. Using auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo with machine-learning-based sign-problem optimization we compute $k(ω)$ for several models proposed for $α$-RuCl$_3$. The observed low-temperature scaling of $k(0)/T$ with $B/T$ results from dominant Kitaev couplings: parameter sets without dominant Kitaev coupling do not exhibit this scaling. It remains robust upon inclusion of optical phonons. Beyond the static response, $k''(ω)$ for the $α$-RuCl$_3$ parameter set reproducing the experimental $k(0)$ data shows local-moment features at high and low $T$, with a single peak at the Larmor frequency. Beyond Kitaev systems we highlight broader applications. Probing ultra-low-energy uniform charge fluctuations is pertinent to Kondo destruction quantum criticality, of broad interest in strange metallicity and unconventional superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文理论推导了磁致旋光率 $k(ω)$ 的线性响应公式，证明其可探测均匀自旋和电荷自由度，并通过 $α$-RuCl$_3$ 的量子蒙特卡洛计算验证了其与 Kitaev 耦合主导行为的关联。
AI.motivation: 磁致旋光率 $k(ω)$ 是低频均匀涨落的新探针，但缺乏统一的理论框架来理解其与自旋/电荷自由度的关系，尤其在关联电子体系中的适用性尚未明确。
AI.method: 在线性响应理论框架下，从一般关联电子哈密顿量出发推导 $k(ω)$ 的表达式；对绝缘体和金属体系分别分析；针对 $α$-RuCl$_3$ 使用辅助场量子蒙特卡洛结合机器学习符号问题优化进行计算。
AI.result: (1) 绝缘体：$k(0)$ 敏感于磁各向异性，$k''(ω)$ 探测均匀动力学自旋磁化率；(2) 金属：涡流导致低频阻尼；(3) $α$-RuCl$_3$ 中 $k(0)/T$ 在低温下随 $B/T$ 标度，仅当 Kitaev 耦合主导时成立，且对声子耦合鲁棒；(4) $k''(ω)$ 在实验参数下呈现局域磁矩特征。
AI.conclusion: $k(ω)$ 是探测超低频均匀自旋与电荷涨落的有效探针；在 $α$-RuCl$_3$ 中验证了其与 Kitaev 物理的关联；未来可推广至 Kondo 毁灭量子临界性等奇异金属与非常规超导问题。

title: Experimental Evidence of Fractional Entropy in Critical Kondo Systems
summary: Unconventional quantum states defying the ubiquitous Fermi-liquid paradigm can emerge in the presence of strong electronic correlations. Among these, non-Abelian anyons - such as Majorana zero modes and Fibonacci anyons - are of particular interest for topological quantum computing due to their non-integer quantum dimensions d>1, which allows for protected non-local encoding and processing of quantum information. However, despite considerable efforts, the unambiguous characterisation of such anyons via transport measurements has proved challenging. Instead, here we provide experimental evidence for the low-temperature fractional entropy Delta S associated with a single anyon, which directly implies its non-Abelian character through the relation Delta S = kB ln(d). This thermodynamic signature is measured in metal-semiconductor quantum circuits engineered to realize quantum-critical states from frustrated interactions. Using a micrometre-scale metallic island coupled to two or three electronic leads, we tune the system to two-channel and three-channel Kondo critical points. By measuring the island charge and exploiting a thermodynamic Maxwell relation, we estimate the entropy associated with the anyons that emerge in these critical states. Our observations reveal fractional values, exposing non-Abelian anyons. The corresponding scaling dimensions are consistent with theoretical predictions for a Majorana zero mode Delta S = kB ln(sqrt(2)) and a Fibonacci anyon Delta S = kB ln(1 +sqrt(5))/2 for two and three channels. These findings establish entropy measurements as a powerful tool for characterizing exotic quantum states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过测量低温分数熵ΔS，在金属-半导体量子电路中实验证实了非阿贝尔任意子的存在，包括马约拉纳零模（ΔS = kB ln(√2)）和斐波那契任意子（ΔS = kB ln((1+√5)/2)），建立了熵测量作为表征奇异量子态的有力工具。
AI.motivation: 非阿贝尔任意子（如马约拉纳零模和斐波那契任意子）因其量子维度d>1，可用于拓扑量子计算的非局域信息编码和处理，但通过输运测量难以明确表征。本文旨在通过热力学熵测量直接证明其非阿贝尔特性。
AI.method: 制作金属-半导体量子电路，将微米尺度金属岛耦合到两个或三个电子引线，调节系统至双通道和三通道近藤临界点。通过测量岛电荷并利用热力学麦克斯韦关系，估算临界态中任意子的熵。
AI.result: 观察到分数熵值，双通道对应ΔS = kB ln(√2)（马约拉纳零模），三通道对应ΔS = kB ln((1+√5)/2)（斐波那契任意子），与理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 实验证实了非阿贝尔任意子的存在，并建立了熵测量作为表征奇异量子态（如非阿贝尔任意子）的有力工具。

title: Magnetic Behavior of Ferro-, Antiferro-, and Ferrimagnetic Systems in the Griffiths Phase: A Theoretical Study
summary: In this report, we provide a theoretical framework for the magnetic behavior of the Griffiths phase, which, along with three-dimensional spin-1/2 Ising ferromagnetic systems, can be extended to antiferromagnetic as well as ferrimagnetic systems. We find that the magnetic behavior in the Griffiths phase of three-dimensional antiferromagnetic and ferrimagnetic systems is more unusual than that of conventional ferromagnetic systems. However, this study offers a possible framework for the identification of Griffiths phase behavior in three-dimensional antiferromagnetic and ferrimagnetic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文为Griffiths相的磁性行为提供了理论框架，可扩展至三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统，发现这些系统中的磁性行为比常规铁磁系统更不寻常，但为识别其Griffiths相行为提供了可能框架。
AI.motivation: 现有理论主要集中于铁磁系统中的Griffiths相行为，缺乏对反铁磁和亚铁磁系统中Griffiths相磁性行为的系统理论框架。
AI.method: 基于三维自旋-1/2 Ising铁磁系统的理论框架，将其扩展至反铁磁及亚铁磁系统，通过理论推导分析Griffiths相中的磁性行为。
AI.result: 三维反铁磁和亚铁磁系统中Griffiths相的磁性行为比常规铁磁系统更为异常和复杂。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为识别和理解三维反铁磁及亚铁磁系统中的Griffiths相行为提供了可行的理论框架。

title: High-resolution ro-vibrational and rotational spectroscopy of the open-shell, linear CCH$^+$ ion ($^3Π$)
comment: 34 pages, 5 figures, supplementary information available on the journal webpage
summary: In this work, we report on the high-resolution infrared spectrum of CCH$^+$ ($^3Π$) recorded in the range $3066-3184$~cm$^{-1}$ by means of leak-out spectroscopy. This spectral range covers the fundamental of the CH stretching mode and a highly excited bending vibrational mode. Based on this data (385 ro-vibrational lines), accurate spectroscopic descriptions of the ground and the two vibrationally excited states of CCH$^+$ were obtained. Besides the band origins, spin-orbit coupling constants, rotational constants, centrifugal distortion constants and $Λ$-doubling constants for the ground and excited vibrational states have been derived. This effective Hamiltonian analysis allowed a search for pure rotational lines of CCH$^+$ in its electronic and vibrational ground state using a two-color millimeterwave - infrared scheme. We observed all rotational transitions from $J^{\prime\prime} = 2$ up to $J^{\prime\prime} = 6$ within the $Ω= 2$ lowest energy fine structure component with resolved hyperfine splittings. This data has already guided the first detection of CCH$^+$ in space toward the Orion Bar photo-dissociation region, and has the potential to support further astronomical searches for CCH$^+$ either through radio or infrared spectroscopy, for example with the James Webb Space Telescope.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了CCH⁺(³Π)的高分辨红外光谱（3066-3184 cm⁻¹），涵盖CH伸缩模和弯曲振动模，基于385条振转谱线精确描述了基态和两个振动激发态，并利用双色毫米波-红外方案观测了纯转动谱线，已成功指导CCH⁺在Orion Bar区域的首次空间探测。
AI.motivation: CCH⁺是一种重要的星际分子离子，但其高分辨光谱数据不足，限制了其在空间中的观测与识别。本文旨在填补CCH⁺在红外和毫米波段的谱学空白，为其天文探测提供精确的分子常数。
AI.method: 采用泄漏光谱技术记录CCH⁺的高分辨红外光谱（3066-3184 cm⁻¹），获得385条振转谱线；通过有效哈密顿量分析拟合得到基态和激发态的分子常数；进一步利用双色毫米波-红外方案实现纯转动谱线的观测。
AI.result: 获得了基态和两个振动激发态的能级原点、自旋-轨道耦合常数、转动常数、离心畸变常数和Λ-双重分裂常数；观测了Ω=2最低能级组分中J″=2至6的纯转动跃迁，并分辨了超精细分裂。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅首次实现了CCH⁺在Orion Bar区域的空间探测，还为未来借助射电望远镜或JWST等红外设备进行更广泛的天文搜索提供了关键光谱依据。

title: An Unsupervised Machine Learning-based Framework for Wafer Scale Variability Analysis and Performance Prediction of Ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 Thin Film Capacitors
summary: Fabrication process-induced performance variability remains a formidable barrier in the high-volume manufacturing of semiconductor chips. With skyrocketing Artificial Intelligence (AI) workload, demand for non-volatile and computational memories is growing exponentially. As embedded non-volatile memory, ferroelectric Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 emerged as a strong candidate due to their CMOS back-end-of-line (BEOL) compatibility, scalability and high performance. However, their sensitive crystallization kinetics leads to significant device-to-device (D2D) non-uniformity leading to unpredictability of performance over wafer scale. In this work, we demonstrate unsupervised machine learning can analyze intra-die D2D variations and predict performance of "unseen" dies efficiently. We present a framework utilizing Principal Component Analysis (PCA) and K-Means clustering to analyze D2D performance variations in HZO capacitors and building on data from multiple dies, we move beyond traditional descriptive statistics to a predictive "Virtual Metrology" approach that separates performance categories, defined by key parameters like remanent polarization (Pr) and coercive voltage (Vc). The analysis further extends to comparing uniformity across different dies across the wafer showing the proposed methodology can accurately predict device performance on untested dies with a low Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) in the range of 5-10%, suggesting a robust path for accelerated yield improvement and reduced metrology overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用无监督机器学习（PCA + K-Means聚类）分析铁电HZO电容器制造过程中器件间性能变异的方法，实现对"未见"芯片性能的虚拟计量预测，MAPE仅为5-10%。
AI.motivation: 半导体芯片量产中，工艺导致的性能变异性是重大障碍；铁电HZO存储器虽性能优异但结晶动力学敏感导致严重的器件间非均匀性，传统描述性统计无法有效预测未测试芯片的性能。
AI.method: 利用主成分分析（PCA）降维结合K-Means聚类算法，基于多个芯片的HZO电容器性能数据（如剩余极化Pr和矫顽电压Vc），构建"虚拟计量"预测框架，对芯片性能类别进行划分和预测。
AI.result: 该框架能够准确预测未测试芯片的性能，平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）低至5-10%，优于传统描述性统计方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了无监督机器学习在半导体制造中预测性能变异的有效性，为加速良率提升和减少计量开销提供了稳健路径。

title: Revealing the origin of XMCD in an altermagnet via three-dimensional control of spins
summary: Altermagnets are an emerging class of collinear antiferromagnets that exhibit unconventional spin-polarised electronic bands, potentially unlocking new functionalities that do not rely on spin-orbit coupling (SOC). Experimental signatures traditionally associated with spin polarisation, like X-ray magnetic circular dichroism (XMCD), are thus being used as a validation of altermagnetism. However, unlike altermagnetic spin-splitting, these responses require SOC and are not invariant under spin-space rotations. This brings into question the extent to which they can be considered direct signatures of altermagnetism. Here, we exploit the g-wave altermagnet $α$-Fe$_{2}$O$_{3}$ to demonstrate that XMCD is governed precisely by the spin-direction-induced symmetry breaking that altermagnetic spin groups are designed to ignore. Strikingly, the XMCD is highly anisotropic and is decoupled from the weak magnetic canting. We show that this anomalous XMCD can be described by on-site Faraday tensors capturing the locally uncompensated spin-orbital anisotropies - a scenario that can be applied to other altermagnets. Leveraging this, we reconstruct complete vectorial maps of nanoscale textures in $α$-Fe$_{2}$O$_{3}$ thin films, including domain walls and topological solitons, which are promising for building future spintronics and magnonics devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了外尔磁体α-Fe₂O₃中X射线磁圆二色性（XMCD）的起源，发现其由自旋方向引起的对称性破缺主导，与弱磁倾斜解耦，并利用这一现象重构了纳米尺度的矢量磁结构图。
AI.motivation: 澄清XMCD信号是否可以作为外尔磁性的直接证据，因为外尔磁体的自旋分裂不依赖于自旋-轨道耦合（SOC），而XMCD本质上需要SOC且不自旋空间旋转不变，这引发了对其作为外尔磁性直接标志的疑问。
AI.method: 利用g波外尔磁体α-Fe₂O₃进行实验，结合局域法拉第张量模型描述由自旋-轨道各向异性导致的XMCD各向异性，并重构纳米磁结构的矢量图。
AI.result: 发现XMCD具有高度各向异性，且与弱磁倾斜解耦；XMCD由自旋方向引起的对称性破缺主导，可通过局域法拉第张量描述；成功重构了α-Fe₂O₃薄膜中包括畴壁和拓扑孤子在内的纳米尺度矢量磁结构图。
AI.conclusion: XMCD并非外尔磁性的直接证据，而是反映自旋方向诱导的对称性破缺；该发现为利用XMCD研究外尔磁体中的纳米磁结构提供了新方法，对自旋电子学和磁振子学器件开发有重要意义。

title: Coordination-Induced Tuning of Ligand-Centered Red Emission in a cis-[Cd(Tz)2(py)2] Complex for Light-Emitting Diodes
summary: Organic--inorganic complexes are promising materials for light-emitting applications. Here, we report a new organometallic complex, cis-[Cd(Tz)$_2$(py)$_2$], featuring a distorted octahedral Cd(II) coordination environment. IR and Raman spectroscopy reveal pronounced coordination-induced changes, particularly in the Raman response of the triazene moiety, indicating electronic and structural perturbation upon Cd(II) complexation. Hirshfeld surface analysis shows that the crystal packing is mainly governed by H$\cdots$H, O$\cdots$H/H$\cdots$O, and C$\cdots$H/H$\cdots$C contacts, whereas $π$--$π$ stacking interactions contribute modestly. Solid-state UV--Vis spectroscopy reveals broad absorption from $\sim$700 to 200 nm and a direct optical band gap of 1.83 eV, indicating semiconductor-like behavior. Photoluminescence measurements show a broad emission band at 500--850 nm with enhanced red contribution upon coordination. The emission is mainly assigned to ligand-centered transitions ($π\rightarrow π^*$ and $n \rightarrow π^*$), consistent with the $d^{10}$ configuration of Cd(II), which suppresses metal-centered and charge-transfer processes. The CIE chromaticity coordinates confirm warm emission, highlighting the potential of cis-[Cd(Tz)$_2$(py)$_2$] for red-emitting optoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新的有机-金属配合物cis-[Cd(Tz)₂(py)₂]，其具有扭曲的八面体Cd(II)配位环境，通过光谱分析、Hirshfeld表面分析及光致发光测量，揭示了该配合物的半导体行为和红光发射特性，有望用于红色发光光电器件。
AI.motivation: 有机-无机配合物在发光应用中具有潜力，探索新型配合物的结构与发光性能是材料科学的重要方向。
AI.method: 通过IR和拉曼光谱表征配位诱导的结构变化，利用Hirshfeld表面分析研究晶体堆积作用，采用固态UV-Vis光谱测定带隙，结合光致发光光谱和CIE色度坐标评估发光性能。
AI.result: 该配合物具有1.83 eV的直接光学带隙，呈半导体特性；光致发光在500–850 nm呈现宽带发射，配位后红光成分增强，CIE色度坐标证实为暖色发射。
AI.conclusion: cis-[Cd(Tz)₂(py)₂] 是一种有潜力的红光发射材料，适用于红色发光光电器件应用。

title: Coordination Engineering of Dual-Atom Catalysts for Overall Water Splitting: Mechanistic Insights from Constant-Potential First-Principles and Machine Learning
summary: The rational design of bifunctional electrocatalysts for the hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) and oxygen evolution reaction (OER) is essential for achieving efficient and cost-effective overall water splitting. Atomically dispersed transition-metal catalysts, including single-atom catalysts and dual-atom catalysts (DACs), have emerged as a prominent class of heterogeneous catalysts, in which coordination engineering plays a decisive role in tuning catalytic performance. Herein, we explore coordination-engineered bifunctional overall water splitting electrocatalysts using graphene-supported DACs (TM1TM2-C6-xNx) as model systems. By tuning C/N coordination and dual-metal combinations (Fe, Co, Ni, and Cu), a library of 228 structures was constructed. A three-step screening strategy, combining constant-charge and constant-potential density functional theory with kinetic analysis of proton-coupled electron transfer (PCET), identifies 24 highly active candidates (TM1TM2 = CoNi, CoCu and Co2) with mixed C/N coordination for OER. These catalysts exhibit overpotentials comparable to that of IrO2 and low PCET barriers (lower than 0.40 eV), among which 22 also show high HER activity. Machine learning reveals clear coordination-dependent structure-performance relationships. Such bifunctionality arises from coordination engineering that enables the simultaneous optimization of OER intermediate adsorption and the hydrogen binding strength for HER. This work establishes coordination engineering as an effective strategy for designing high-performance bifunctional dual-atom electrocatalysts for overall water splitting.

AI.tldr: 本文通过调控石墨烯支撑的双原子催化剂（TM1TM2-C6-xNx）的C/N配位环境和金属组合（Fe, Co, Ni, Cu），构建了228种结构库，采用三步筛选策略结合恒电荷/恒电位密度泛函理论和质子耦合电子转移动力学分析，识别出24种高活性OER候选催化剂（CoNi、CoCu、Co₂），其中22种同时具备高HER活性，并通过机器学习揭示了配位依赖的结构-性能关系。
AI.motivation: 设计和开发用于全水分解的高效、低成本双功能电催化剂（同时催化HER和OER），尤其是通过配位工程调控原子分散的过渡金属催化剂（如单原子和双原子催化剂）的性能。
AI.method: 以石墨烯支撑的双原子催化剂（TM1TM2-C6-xNx）为模型，通过调控C/N配位和双金属组合（Fe、Co、Ni、Cu）构建228种结构库；采用三步筛选策略，结合恒电荷/恒电位密度泛函理论（DFT）和质子耦合电子转移（PCET）动力学分析；利用机器学习揭示配位依赖的结构-性能关系。
AI.result: 筛选出24种高活性OER候选催化剂（CoNi、CoCu、Co₂），其过电位可与IrO₂媲美，PCET能垒低于0.40 eV；其中22种同时具有高HER活性。
AI.conclusion: 配位工程能够同时优化OER中间体吸附和HER氢结合强度，是实现高性能双功能双原子电催化剂的有效设计策略。

title: Born-Qualified: An Autonomous Framework for Deploying Advanced Energy and Electronic Materials
summary: Autonomous science is transforming how we discover materials and chemical systems for advanced energy technologies. However, many initially promising systems never reach deployment. This "valley of death" stems from optimization that prioritizes laboratory metrics over industrial viability. We propose a new strategy: "born-qualified" autonomous development, which embeds manufacturability, cost, and durability constraints from the outset. This approach is enabled by four pillars, including the development of multi-objective metrics, causal models, a modular infrastructure, and embedding manufacturing in the discovery loop. Realizing this vision will require sustained, community-wide commitment, but the potential return on that investment is commensurate with the scale of the challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"天生合格"自主开发策略，将可制造性、成本和耐久性约束嵌入材料发现过程，以解决实验室成果无法产业化推广的"死亡之谷"问题。
AI.motivation: 许多有前景的材料系统在实验室阶段表现优异，但永远无法实现产业化应用，这种"死亡之谷"源于优化过程优先考虑实验室指标而非工业可行性。
AI.method: 提出"天生合格"自主开发策略，包含四大支柱：多目标指标、因果模型、模块化基础设施、将制造嵌入发现循环。
AI.result: 从方法论层面提出了一种新的自主科学范式，但本文更多是愿景性论述，尚无具体实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 实现这一愿景需要全社区持续投入，但其投资回报与挑战规模相匹配。

title: TrueEBSD in MTEX: automatic image matching for correlative microscopy applications
comment: 23 pages, 12 figures. Source code at https://github.com/vtvivian/mtex-trueEbsd, copper dataset at https://zenodo.org/records/16902083, related example WC-Co dataset at https://zenodo.org/records/13870131
summary: TrueEBSD is an open-source MATLAB program for image alignment and spatial distortion correction of images and electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) maps. We have re-implemented TrueEBSD as an add-on to MTEX, an established toolbox for EBSD data analysis. Spatial alignment enables correlative analysis methods, such as augmenting EBSD orientation maps with data from other imaging modes. The augmented EBSD maps can then be analysed further using MTEX. We demonstrate TrueEBSD on two example case studies: one for measuring Co phase fraction and WC contiguity in a WC-Co composite, and another for determining the relative susceptibility of grain boundaries to void formation in a copper polycrystal. In both examples, the EBSD map was augmented with scanning electron microscopy (SEM) image data. This enabled quantitative crystallographic measurements which would not be possible from analysing the EBSD maps and images separately.

AI.tldr: TrueEBSD是一个开源MATLAB程序，现已作为MTEX工具箱的插件重新实现，用于图像对齐和空间畸变校正，使EBSD图谱能与SEM等图像数据进行关联分析，并通过两个案例（WC-Co复合材料中Co相分数测量和铜多晶中晶界空洞形成敏感性分析）展示了其定量晶体学测量能力。
AI.motivation: 现有EBSD数据与其它成像模式（如SEM）的图像数据缺乏有效的空间对齐和畸变校正工具，限制了关联分析方法的开展，导致无法从单独分析中获取关键的定量晶体学测量结果。
AI.method: 将TrueEBSD重新实现为MTEX的插件，实现图像对齐与空间畸变校正功能，使EBSD取向图谱能与其它成像模式数据进行空间对齐，并利用MTEX进行后续分析。
AI.result: 在WC-Co复合材料中成功测量了Co相分数和WC接触度；在铜多晶中确定了晶界对空洞形成的相对敏感性。
AI.conclusion: TrueEBSD作为MTEX插件能够有效实现EBSD图谱与SEM图像数据的空间对齐和畸变校正，使定量晶体学测量成为可能，而这些测量无法通过单独分析EBSD图谱或图像实现。

title: Oxygen Vacancies at Dislocation Core Modulate Plasticity in Strontium Titanate
summary: Dislocation core chemistry in oxides critically influences mechanical behavior and functionality; yet the evolution of core chemistry during the dislocation motion in them has not been directly observed. Here, using SrTiO3 as a model material, we combine aberration-corrected scanning transmission electron microscopy and electron energy-loss spectroscopy with atomic-level molecular dynamics (MD) simulations to correlate the <110>{1-10} dislocation core structure, oxygen vacancy density, charge state, and mobility with each other. We find that the mechanically induced dislocation loops exhibit dissociated cores, whose oxygen vacancy density depends on the gliding distance: short loops are Ti-reduced and oxygen-deficient at the edge dislocation core, whereas longer loops remain close to stoichiometry in both the edge and screw components. MD simulations reveal that kink-assisted edge dislocation glide in SrTiO3 leaves oxygen-deficient trails behind, modulating the oxygen content inside the edge core. These results demonstrate that oxygen-vacancy evolution at the dislocation core intrinsically couples with plasticity in ionic crystals, suggesting a mechanism for oxygen vacancy-dependent dislocation mobility in plastically deformed oxides.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SrTiO3作为模型材料，结合STEM、EELS和MD模拟，首次直接观察到氧化物中位错核心化学在运动过程中的演化，发现氧空位密度与位错滑移距离相关，揭示了氧空位演化与塑性变形之间的内在耦合机制。
AI.motivation: 氧化物中位错核心化学对力学行为和功能性至关重要，但位错运动过程中核心化学的演化从未被直接观测到，缺乏对氧空位与位错迁移率之间关系的理解。
AI.method: 以SrTiO3为模型材料，结合球差校正扫描透射电子显微镜(STEM)、电子能量损失谱(EELS)与原子级分子动力学(MD)模拟，关联分析<110>{1-10}位错核心结构、氧空位密度、电荷态和迁移率。
AI.result: 机械诱导的位错环呈现解离核心，氧空位密度取决于滑移距离：短路错环的边缘位错核心呈现Ti还原和缺氧，而较长位错环的边缘和螺旋分量均接近化学计量比。MD模拟表明，扭折辅助的边缘位错滑移会在后方留下缺氧痕迹。
AI.conclusion: 氧空位在位错核心的演化与离子晶体中的塑性变形内在耦合，提出了氧空位依赖的位错迁移率机制，为理解氧化物塑性变形提供了新视角。

title: Determination of Density Functional Tight Binding Models for Cerium Allotropes
comment: Main manuscript: 21 pages, 4 figures 2 tables SI: 7 pages, 2 tables
summary: We have developed Density Functional Tight Binding (DFTB) models for cerium that accurately predict both the electronic band structure and energetic ordering of different allotropes. We show that global optimization of the electronic confining potentials minimize the errors in the predicted Kohn-Sham energies while facilitating determination of a many-body repulsive energy. Our results illustrate the ability of DFTB to accurately reproduce complex f-electron interactions for multiple phases while leveraging minimal Density Functional Theory data.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了针对铈的DFTB模型，通过全局优化电子限制势能，精确预测电子能带结构和同素异形体能量排序，展示了DFTB在最小化DFT数据下复现复杂f电子相互作用的能力。
AI.motivation: 铈的f电子相互作用复杂，现有方法难以同时准确预测其电子能带结构和不同同素异形体的能量排序，需要开发更高效的模型。
AI.method: 开发了针对铈的DFTB模型，通过全局优化电子限制势能来最小化Kohn-Sham能量误差，同时确定多体排斥能。
AI.result: 该DFTB模型能够准确预测铈的电子能带结构和同素异形体的能量排序，且仅需使用极少的DFT数据。
AI.conclusion: DFTB能够准确复现复杂的f电子相互作用，为研究含f电子的材料提供了高效可靠的计算方法。
